title: geranium atrum
intro: Geranium atrum, also known as the Purple-Leafed Geranium, is a perennial plant species native to Asia, characterized by its dark purple leaves and small, pink to purple flowers. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and tannins. The health benefits of Geranium atrum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various ailments such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. Geranium atrum can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used both internally and topically to harness its medicinal properties.
